response.overview: This collection brings together the complete Gomorrah story, including the original television series, the film L’Immortale focusing on Ciro Di Marzio, and the prequel series Le Origini.  Together, they depict the structure, evolution, and backstory of the Neapolitan Camorra, following key figures across different periods to show how power is built, maintained, and passed on.
response.title: Gomorrah Collection
